prompt: A soft, airy anime portrait of a delicate young woman in a minimalist off-white background, shown from the chest up in a close three-quarter view. She has long, slightly wavy dark brown with ash-gray highlights hair with wispy strands and straight-cut bangs, tied on one side with a large black ribbon bow. Her eyes are large, glossy, and pale gray with detailed lashes and a dreamy, distant expression. She rests her cheek against one hand, with slender fingers partly covering her face and muted gray nail polish visible. She wears a white off-shoulder blouse with voluminous sleeves, soft ruffles, gathered fabric, and thin black ribbon ties on the sleeves, creating a gentle monochrome contrast. Add a single long, elegant gold drop earring with a small pearl on the visible ear. Use a clean manga-inspired illustration style with light linework, subtle blush tones, soft cel shading, and painterly highlights in the hair. The mood is quiet, wistful, and feminine, with a refined fashion-illustration feel and a very limited palette of white, black, taupe, and gray.
